source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal/squamous cytokeratin strongly associated with aberrant basaloid differentiation in lung
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the epithelial identity of these aberrant basaloid cells
KRT19 marks simple epithelial cells and is characteristic of basaloid-like progenitor states
TP63 is the master transcription factor for basal cell identity in stratified and pseudostratified epithelia
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells associated with fibrotic remodeling
CDH1 (E-cadherin) marks epithelial cell-cell adhesion, distinguishing these cells from mesenchymal populations
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in basaloid progenitor-like cells
ITGB6 encodes integrin beta-6, which activates TGF-beta and is a hallmark of aberrant basaloid cells in pulmonary fibrosis
GDF15 is a stress-responsive cytokine highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung
LAMC2 (laminin gamma-2) is associated with migratory basaloid phenotypes and epithelial remodeling
SOX4 is a developmental transcription factor upregulated in aberrant progenitor-like epithelial states
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein that is a canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting lipid metabolism
MARCO is a scavenger receptor highly specific to alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor enriched in tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a master transcription factor essential for alveolar macrophage differentiation and lipid homeostasis
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor characteristic of alternatively activated alveolar macrophages
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages reflecting their role in surfactant lipid processing
C1QA is a complement component produced by macrophages, marking their innate immune function
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue-resident macrophages
LSAMP is a cell adhesion molecule enriched in alveolar macrophages distinguishing them from other myeloid cells
CCL18 is a chemokine constitutively secreted by alveolar macrophages in the human lung
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 (AT1) cells, expressed on their apical surface
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells of the lung
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is essential for AT1 cell caveolae formation and gas exchange function
HOPX is a transcription factor that marks AT1 cell differentiation from alveolar progenitors
CLDN18 is a tight junction protein specific to alveolar epithelial cells, enriched in AT1 cells
RTKN2 is a recently identified specific marker of human AT1 cells
CAV2 (caveolin-2) co-localizes with CAV1 in AT1 cell caveolae structures
CLIC5 is a chloride channel enriched in AT1 cells involved in fluid homeostasis
AQP4 is a water channel expressed in AT1 cells facilitating alveolar fluid transport
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the canonical and most specific marker of alveolar type 2 (AT2) cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immune defense
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 as a canonical AT2 marker
NAPSA (napsin A) is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant protein processing in AT2 cells
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter in lamellar bodies essential for surfactant packaging in AT2 cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) marks lamellar bodies in AT2 cells and is a specific AT2 surface marker
SFTPD (surfactant protein D) is a collectin secreted by AT2 cells for host defense
SLC34A2 is a phosphate transporter enriched in AT2 cells for surfactant phospholipid synthesis
LPCAT1 is a lysophospholipid acyltransferase critical for dipalmitoylphosphatidylcholine synthesis in AT2 cells
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
MS4A1 (CD20) is the canonical B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor signaling complex, a definitive B cell marker
BANK1 is a B cell scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling, specific to B lymphocytes
PAX5 is the master transcription factor for B cell lineage commitment and identity
EBF1 is a transcription factor essential for early B cell development and maintenance
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B lymphocytes for BCR signaling
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is the receptor for BAFF, essential for B cell survival
CD37 is a tetraspanin predominantly expressed on mature B cells
BCL11A is a zinc finger transcription factor critical for B cell development
KRT17 is a type I cytokeratin that is a canonical marker of airway basal cells
KRT5 is a type II cytokeratin that pairs with KRT14 as a definitive basal cell marker
TP63 (p63) is the master transcription factor for basal cell identity in airway epithelium
KRT15 marks basal progenitor cells in stratified and pseudostratified epithelia
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in airway basal cells
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a microRNA specifically expressed in basal epithelial cells
ITGA2 (integrin alpha-2) mediates basal cell adhesion to the basement membrane
EGFR is highly expressed in basal cells driving their proliferation and self-renewal
LGALS7B (galectin-7) is specifically expressed in stratified epithelial basal cells
DNAH12 encodes a dynein axonemal heavy chain essential for ciliary motility
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein specific to motile ciliated cells
RSPH1 is a radial spoke head protein essential for ciliary beat regulation
CAPS (calcyphosine) is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in ciliated epithelial cells
DNAH9 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain critical for ciliary motility
HYDIN is a central pair protein essential for ciliary motility, mutated in primary ciliary dyskinesia
SPAG16 is a sperm-associated antigen also expressed in motile cilia of airway epithelium
DNAH5 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain whose mutations cause primary ciliary dyskinesia
TPPP3 is a tubulin polymerization promoting protein enriched in ciliated cells
C20ORF85 is a highly specific marker of multiciliated cells in the airway
PIFO (pitchfork) is involved in ciliogenesis and is specific to ciliated cells
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of classical monocytes and neutrophils
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8, highly expressed in classical monocytes
VCAN (versican) is a proteoglycan highly expressed in classical CD14+ monocytes
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule specific to classical monocytes
S100A12 (calgranulin C) is specifically expressed in classical monocytes and granulocytes
CD14 is the canonical surface marker defining classical monocytes (CD14++CD16-)
THBS1 (thrombospondin-1) is highly expressed in classical monocytes during inflammation
IL1R2 is a decoy receptor for IL-1 enriched in classical monocytes
NAMPT (visfatin) is an enzyme/cytokine highly upregulated in activated classical monocytes
SCGB3A2 (secretoglobin 3A2) is a canonical secretory marker of club cells in the airway
SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16) is the definitive marker of club (Clara) cells in the airway
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin family member expressed in club and goblet cells
CYP2B7P reflects the xenobiotic metabolism function characteristic of club cells
SFTPB is expressed in club cells in addition to AT2 cells, marking secretory function
WFDC2 (HE4) is a secreted protease inhibitor enriched in club cells
PIGR (polymeric immunoglobulin receptor) is expressed in secretory airway cells including club cells
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase expressed by club cells in the distal airway
CLEC9A is a C-type lectin receptor that is the most specific marker of cDC1s
WDFY4 is essential for cross-presentation and is specifically expressed in cDC1s
CADM1 is a cell adhesion molecule used as a surface marker to identify cDC1s
IDO1 is an immunoregulatory enzyme expressed by cDC1s for immune tolerance
CPVL is a carboxypeptidase enriched in cDC1s involved in antigen processing
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in classical dendritic cells including cDC1s
IRF8 is a transcription factor essential for cDC1 development and function
ID2 is a transcription factor required for cDC1 lineage specification
WFDC21P is a pseudogene transcript enriched in dendritic cells, particularly cDC1s
CLEC10A (CD301) is a C-type lectin receptor that is a canonical marker of cDC2s
CD1C is a lipid antigen-presenting molecule used to define cDC2s in humans
FCER1A (high-affinity IgE receptor alpha) is expressed on cDC2s in humans
CCL17 (TARC) is a chemokine produced by cDC2s to recruit Th2 cells
HLA-DQA1 is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in cDC2s for antigen presentation
CD86 is a costimulatory molecule highly expressed on cDC2s for T cell activation
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by cDC2s for tissue repair signaling
SLC8A1 is a sodium-calcium exchanger enriched in cDC2s distinguishing them from cDC1s
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine constitutively expressed by cytotoxic T cells
CD8A is the canonical co-receptor defining cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CD8B pairs with CD8A to form the CD8 co-receptor on cytotoxic T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in activated CD8+ T cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease in cytotoxic granules mediating target cell killing
GZMH is a granzyme family member expressed in cytotoxic T cells
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex confirming T cell identity
PRF1 (perforin) forms pores in target cells, essential for cytotoxic T cell killing
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ T cell differentiation
GNLY (granulysin) is an antimicrobial peptide in cytotoxic granules of CD8+ T cells
CD1A is the canonical surface marker of Langerhans cells for lipid antigen presentation
CD207 (langerin) is the definitive marker of Langerhans cells, forming Birbeck granules
S100B is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in Langerhans cells
CD1E is a lipid antigen-presenting molecule expressed in Langerhans cells
FCER1A (high-affinity IgE receptor) is expressed on Langerhans cells
ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase highly expressed on Langerhans cells
CD1C is expressed on Langerhans cells for lipid antigen presentation
PKIB is a protein kinase inhibitor enriched in Langerhans-type dendritic cells
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan abundantly produced by fibroblasts in the extracellular matrix
COL1A2 encodes type I collagen alpha-2, a major structural protein produced by fibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) is highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
SFRP2 is a Wnt signaling modulator expressed by fibroblast subpopulations
PI16 is a peptidase inhibitor marking universal fibroblast progenitors
IGFBP6 is an IGF binding protein highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
CCDC80 is a secreted protein enriched in fibroblasts involved in ECM organization
C3 complement component is produced by lung fibroblasts as part of local immune regulation
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin highly expressed in goblet and secretory airway cells
SCGB1A1 is expressed in goblet cells in addition to club cells, marking secretory function
MUC5B is a gel-forming mucin that is the primary mucin produced by goblet cells
BPIFB1 is a bactericidal protein secreted by goblet cells in the airway
WFDC2 (HE4) is a protease inhibitor highly expressed in goblet cells
PIGR transports IgA across the epithelium and is enriched in goblet cells
LCN2 (lipocalin-2) is an antimicrobial protein secreted by goblet cells
AGR2 is a protein disulfide isomerase essential for mucin folding in goblet cells
TFF3 (trefoil factor 3) is co-secreted with mucins by goblet cells for mucosal protection
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor abundantly produced by goblet cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on ILC1/NK-like innate lymphoid cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule in ILC1/NK-like cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in cytotoxic ILCs
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor expressed on ILC1-like cells
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine produced by ILCs and NK cells
XCL2 is a chemokine co-expressed with XCL1 in innate lymphoid cells
KLRC4-KLRK1 (NKG2D) is an activating receptor on ILCs for stress ligand recognition
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by tissue-resident ILCs for epithelial repair
TXK is a Tec family kinase expressed in ILCs and T cells
ZBTB16 (PLZF) is a transcription factor marking innate-like lymphocytes including ILCs
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of ILC2s and ILC3s
AREG (amphiregulin) is a key effector cytokine of ILC2s for tissue repair
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on ILC2s and is essential for their survival
KIT (CD117) is expressed on ILC2s and ILC3s, marking their progenitor-like state
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for ILC2 identity and function
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is expressed on ILC2s and activated T cells
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILC2s in the lung
TNFSF11 (RANKL) is produced by ILC2s/ILC3s for immune regulation
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for all ILC lineage development
FOXI1 is the master transcription factor defining pulmonary ionocytes
CFTR is the cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator highly expressed in ionocytes
ASCL3 is a transcription factor specifically marking ionocytes in the airway
ATP6V1B1 is a vacuolar ATPase subunit reflecting the ion transport function of ionocytes
ATP6V0B is a vacuolar proton pump subunit enriched in ionocytes
TFCP2L1 is a transcription factor associated with ionocyte specification
PDE1C is a phosphodiesterase highly expressed in ionocytes
CLCNKB is a chloride channel reflecting the ion transport specialization of ionocytes
HEPACAM2 is a cell adhesion molecule specifically expressed in ionocytes
CCL21 is a chemokine constitutively produced by lymphatic endothelial cells for immune cell trafficking
PROX1 is the master transcription factor for lymphatic endothelial cell identity
LYVE1 is a hyaluronan receptor that is a canonical marker of lymphatic endothelium
PDPN (podoplanin) is a glycoprotein expressed on lymphatic endothelial cells
TFF3 is highly expressed in lymphatic endothelial cells in the lung
TBX1 is a transcription factor involved in lymphatic vessel development
NTS (neurotensin) is specifically expressed in lymphatic endothelial cells
MMRN1 (multimerin-1) is an endothelial protein enriched in lymphatic vessels
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein expressed in endothelial cells including lymphatics
SPP1 (osteopontin) is highly expressed in tissue macrophages, especially in fibrotic contexts
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages
MARCO is a scavenger receptor expressed on tissue macrophages
GPNMB is a glycoprotein highly expressed in activated/lipid-laden macrophages
CTSB (cathepsin B) is a lysosomal protease abundantly expressed in macrophages
SLC16A10 is a monocarboxylate transporter enriched in tissue macrophages
APOE is an apolipoprotein produced by macrophages for lipid metabolism
MMP19 is a matrix metalloproteinase expressed by tissue macrophages during remodeling
CD163L1 is a scavenger receptor related to CD163, expressed on tissue macrophages
TPSB2 (tryptase beta-2) is the canonical serine protease marker of mast cells
TPSAB1 (tryptase alpha/beta-1) is a major mast cell granule protease
CPA3 (carboxypeptidase A3) is a mast cell-specific granule enzyme
KIT (CD117) is the stem cell factor receptor essential for mast cell development
MS4A2 (FcεRIβ) is the beta chain of the high-affinity IgE receptor on mast cells
GATA2 is a transcription factor essential for mast cell differentiation
HDC (histidine decarboxylase) synthesizes histamine, the hallmark mediator of mast cells
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33R) is the IL-33 receptor highly expressed on mast cells
HPGDS synthesizes prostaglandin D2, a key lipid mediator released by mast cells
LTC4S synthesizes leukotriene C4, a potent lipid mediator produced by mast cells
CCR7 is the lymph node homing receptor upregulated upon DC maturation
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) is a lysosomal protein specifically marking mature dendritic cells
CCL22 is a chemokine produced by mature DCs to attract regulatory T cells
CCL19 is a chemokine produced by mature DCs for lymph node homing
FSCN1 (fascin) is an actin-bundling protein upregulated in mature DCs for dendrite formation
IDO1 is an immunoregulatory enzyme induced upon DC maturation
BIRC3 is an anti-apoptotic protein upregulated in mature DCs via NF-κB signaling
CD83 is a canonical surface marker of mature dendritic cells
IL15 is a cytokine produced by mature DCs to activate NK and T cells
RELB is an NF-κB family transcription factor essential for DC maturation
MSLN (mesothelin) is the canonical surface marker of mesothelial cells
CALB2 (calretinin) is a calcium-binding protein used diagnostically to identify mesothelial cells
UPK3B (uroplakin 3B) is a membrane protein expressed in mesothelial cells
PRG4 (lubricin) is a glycoprotein secreted by mesothelial cells for serosal lubrication
HAS1 (hyaluronan synthase 1) produces hyaluronic acid, a key mesothelial product
ITLN1 (intelectin-1/omentin) is a lectin highly expressed in mesothelial cells
PDPN (podoplanin) is expressed on mesothelial cells lining serous cavities
VCAM1 is an adhesion molecule expressed by mesothelial cells during inflammation
HP (haptoglobin) is produced by mesothelial cells in the pleural cavity
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen alpha-1, the major collagen produced by myofibroblasts
COL3A1 encodes type III collagen, abundantly produced by myofibroblasts during fibrosis
POSTN (periostin) is a matricellular protein highly expressed by myofibroblasts
CTHRC1 is a collagen triple helix repeat protein marking pathological myofibroblasts
MYL9 (myosin light chain 9) reflects the contractile phenotype of myofibroblasts
CTGF (CCN2) is a profibrotic growth factor produced by myofibroblasts
FN1 (fibronectin) is a major ECM component produced by myofibroblasts
SERPINE1 (PAI-1) is a serine protease inhibitor produced by myofibroblasts promoting fibrosis
BGN (biglycan) is a proteoglycan enriched in myofibroblasts during tissue remodeling
TNC (tenascin-C) is an ECM glycoprotein produced by myofibroblasts in fibrotic tissue
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein highly expressed in NK cells
GNLY (granulysin) is an antimicrobial effector molecule in NK cell granules
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor forming heterodimers with NKG2 family members
KLRF1 (NKp80) is an activating receptor specific to NK cells
FGFBP2 is a secreted protein specific to cytotoxic NK cells
SPON2 is a secreted protein enriched in NK cells involved in innate immunity
GZMB (granzyme B) is a cytotoxic serine protease in NK cell granules
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for NK cell cytotoxicity
FCGR3A (CD16) mediates antibody-dependent cellular cytotoxicity by NK cells
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a chemokine rapidly produced by activated NK cells
S1PR5 is a sphingosine-1-phosphate receptor controlling NK cell tissue egress
FCGR3A (CD16) defines non-classical monocytes (CD14dim CD16+)
LILRB2 is an inhibitory receptor enriched in non-classical monocytes
LILRA5 is an activating receptor specifically expressed on non-classical monocytes
MTSS1 is an actin regulatory protein enriched in non-classical monocytes
LST1 is an MHC class III gene product highly expressed in non-classical monocytes
WARS (tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase) is upregulated in non-classical monocytes
PAPSS2 is a sulfotransferase enriched in non-classical monocytes
TCF7L2 is a transcription factor enriched in non-classical monocytes
C5AR2 is a complement receptor expressed on non-classical monocytes
RGS5 is a regulator of G-protein signaling that is a canonical pericyte marker
PDGFRB is the PDGF receptor beta, the definitive surface marker of pericytes
NOTCH3 is a receptor essential for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell identity
COX4I2 is a cytochrome c oxidase subunit enriched in pericytes

CALD1 (caldesmon) is a smooth muscle/pericyte marker involved in contractility

MZB1 is an ER-resident protein essential for antibody secretion in plasma cells
XBP1 is a transcription factor driving the unfolded protein response essential for plasma cell function
IGHA1 encodes IgA1 heavy chain, the predominant immunoglobulin secreted by mucosal plasma cells
IGHG1 encodes IgG1 heavy chain, reflecting active antibody secretion by plasma cells
PRDM1 (BLIMP1) is the master transcription factor for plasma cell differentiation

IRF4 is a transcription factor essential for plasma cell differentiation
SSR4 is a signal sequence receptor subunit upregulated in plasma cells for ER protein translocation
TXNDC5 is a thioredoxin domain protein in the ER, highly expressed in antibody-secreting plasma cells
GZMB is paradoxically highly expressed in pDCs where it has immunoregulatory rather than cytotoxic function
IRF7 is the master transcription factor for type I interferon production in pDCs
IRF8 is a transcription factor essential for pDC development
IL3RA (CD123) is the canonical surface marker used to identify pDCs
TCF4 (E2-2) is the master transcription factor for pDC lineage specification
JCHAIN is highly expressed in pDCs, distinguishing them from other DC subsets
PLD4 is a phospholipase specifically expressed in pDCs

PTGDS (prostaglandin D2 synthase) is highly expressed in pDCs

Chromogranin A is a canonical neuroendocrine marker found in secretory granules of neuroendocrine cells

CALCA encodes calcitonin gene-related peptide, a well-known neuropeptide produced by pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
Secretogranin V is a neuroendocrine secretory granule protein involved in neuropeptide processing

Secretogranin II is a neuroendocrine secretory granule component and established marker of neuroendocrine differentiation
Calcium-dependent secretion activator is critical for dense-core vesicle exocytosis in neuroendocrine cells
Neurexin 1 is a neuronal/neuroendocrine cell surface protein involved in synaptic signaling
PTPRN2 (IA-2 beta/phogrin) is a dense-core vesicle transmembrane protein and established neuroendocrine marker
IL2RA (CD25) is a hallmark surface marker of regulatory T cells, constitutively expressed at high levels
CTLA-4 is a co-inhibitory receptor constitutively expressed on Tregs and essential for their suppressive function
IKZF2 (Helios) is a transcription factor preferentially expressed in thymus-derived regulatory T cells
ICOS is an inducible co-stimulatory molecule highly expressed on activated Tregs and important for their function

BATF is a transcription factor critical for Treg differentiation and effector function
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is a TNF receptor superfamily member constitutively expressed on Tregs
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is a co-stimulatory receptor highly expressed on activated regulatory T cells

RTKN2 has been identified as a specific surface marker for human regulatory T cells
ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase expressed on Tregs that mediates immunosuppression via adenosine generation
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain 11 is the most specific marker for differentiated smooth muscle cells
Alpha-smooth muscle actin is a canonical cytoskeletal marker of smooth muscle cells
Myosin regulatory light chain 9 is highly expressed in smooth muscle and essential for contraction
Calponin 1 is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein and established SMC differentiation marker
Tropomyosin 2 is a key contractile filament protein abundantly expressed in smooth muscle cells

Caldesmon is an actin- and calmodulin-binding protein enriched in smooth muscle cells

CD3 delta is a core component of the T cell receptor complex and a definitive T cell marker
CD6 is a T cell surface glycoprotein involved in T cell activation and co-stimulation
BCL11B is a transcription factor essential for T cell commitment and development

IL-7 receptor alpha (CD127) is expressed on most T cells and essential for T cell homeostasis
CD2 is a T cell surface adhesion molecule involved in T cell activation
FYN is a Src family kinase critical for T cell receptor signaling
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is an essential signaling component of the T cell receptor complex
Calcium/calmodulin-dependent protein kinase IV is preferentially expressed in T cells and regulates T cell activation

DKK2 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in arterial endothelium

15-hydroxyprostaglandin dehydrogenase is highly enriched in lung capillary endothelial cells (gCap/aCap)

VE-cadherin (CDH5) is a canonical endothelial adherens junction protein
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker highly expressed in capillary endothelium

Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial marker with high expression in capillary endothelium

Vasoactive intestinal peptide receptor 1 is enriched in capillary endothelial cells
Periostin is enriched in peribronchial endothelium and associated with bronchial vascular remodeling
Atypical chemokine receptor 1 (DARC) is a marker of venular/peribronchial endothelial cells involved in leukocyte trafficking

Plasmalemma vesicle-associated protein marks fenestrated endothelium found in peribronchial vessels

Phospholipase A1 member A is specifically expressed in venous endothelial cells
LIF receptor is enriched in venous endothelium and involved in cytokine signaling
Adhesion G protein-coupled receptor G6 is differentially expressed in venous endothelial cells
